name: Alandalus Property Company
summary: Alandalus Property Company engages in the commercial real estate investment and development activities in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. It constructs, owns, and manages centers, and commercial and residential complexes. The company is also involved in the general contracting of residential and commercial buildings, educational, recreational, health institutions, roads, dams, water and sewage project, electrical, and mechanical works. In addition, it engages in the leasing, maintenance, and operation of real estate properties, buildings, and commercial complexes, as well as ownership, development, and investment of lands and real estate properties. Alandalus Property Company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.
